Rejoignez-nous le samedi 29 août 2025, à 16h00

pour célébrer notre union dans les liens sacrés du mariage.

Marie-Nella et Sidney

VENUE

Our Location

How to Find Us

We've chosen a beautiful venue for our special day. Here's everything you need to know to join us.

Venue

St. Mary's Cathedral

123 Wedding Avenue
Paris, France 75007

Getting There

By Car

Parking available on site. Enter from the south entrance.

Public Transport

Bus lines 42, 69, 82 stop directly in front of the venue.

Travel Time

15 minutes from city center, 30 minutes from airport.

Nearby Accommodations

Royal Hotel

0.5 miles from venue

$$

$$$

1.2 miles from venue
